description: Style Notemother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers to create the right impactProduct DetailsBlack printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline with a button closure, short sleeves, maroon panelling on the chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not soakCertain fabrics will shrinkSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
